title: Craftable OP Items
description: This mod adds a set of overpowered "Godly" equipment with custom high-level enchantments and unique attributes. All items are fully craftable via survival-friendly recipes, bringing ultimate power to your Minecraft 1.21.11 experience.
body:
### OP Items:
OP Items is a high-power equipment mod designed for players who want to transcend the limits of standard gear. It introduces a set of "Godly" weapons and armor with custom, over-leveled enchantments and specialized attributes that make you nearly invincible in your survival world.

## 🛡️ Key Features
- The Godly Arsenal: Craft a complete set of gear, including the Godly Mace, Spear, and Sword, each pre-enchanted with levels far beyond the vanilla maximum (e.g., Sharpness VII, Looting V).

- Ultimate Protection: Equip the Godly Armor Set (Helmet, Chestplate, Leggings, and Boots) to gain massive defense boosts, featuring Protection VIII and specialized movement enchants like Swift Sneak V and Soul Speed V.

- Survival Ready: No need for creative mode or complex commands—all items are obtainable through custom, balanced crafting recipes in your survival world.

- Modern Compatibility: Fully optimized for Fabric 1.21.11+ using the latest Data Component system for seamless performance.

## ⚔️ Equipment Preview
- OP Mace: Features Wind Burst, Density V, and Breach IV for devastating impact.

- OP Spear: High-tier Sharpness and Lunge capabilities for long-range dominance.

- OP Sword: The ultimate blade with Sharpness VII, Fire Aspect, and Looting V.

- Armor Set: Maximum durability and protection with Unbreaking V and Protection VIII across all pieces.

🛠️ Installation
Make sure you are running Fabric 1.21.11+.

Download and drop the mod .jar file into your mods folder.

(Optional) If using as a Datapack, place the folder into your world's datapacks directory and use /reload.
